minimum_req: Desktop computer (e.g. optimized for wider screens)
Cross-platform tool (works in Windows, Mac and Linux)
input_data_formats: Widely used file formats (CSV, JSON, XML, etc.)
output_data_formats: Widely used file formats (CSV, JSON, XML, etc.)
name: Mountainside agroforestry design geometry nodes.
description:
Designing alignment on slopes, interpreting the morphology of watersheds and drainage basins.
Agroforestry: planting trees according to patterns based on productive, ecosystemic, hydrological, or landscape objectives.
Mountainside agroforestry design allows for combining the two design approaches, leveraging the benefits of both.

Slope design can be carried out according to the principles of Keyline Design®

The technical challenge in combining agroforestry pattern design with montainside design lies in accurately calculating slopes and parallels, and arranging complex patterns along curves.
And the difficulty lies in quickly evaluating different possibilities.
With geometry nodes in Blender, it is possible to create mountainside agroforestry design quickly and accurately.
input_data_formats_other: Digital Terrain Model, vector GIS data
